caption: A person is working on a light-colored vehicle outdoors, with the hood open to reveal the engine bay and a red fuel canister resting nearby on the ground. The scene shifts from a wide view of the vehicle's interior and exterior to a close-up focus on the electrical system. Inside the car, a red wire is routed through the passenger-side dashboard area, leading into a fuse box. The fuse box contains several labeled slots with colorful fuses; visible labels include "L.C.D.", "BRAKE", "STOP", "INT MR", "RADIO", and "AIR BAG". The progression of shots moves from the overall setting of the car and surrounding equipment to a detailed view of the red wiring and the specific arrangement of the fuses within the plastic housing.
